to create your own world is to pluck ideas out of your imagination and breathe life into them through action.

this requires you to:
(1) notice your ideas
(2) believe they are worthy of action
(3) *take* action. not *think about* or *plan* to take action, but actually doing it.

the world is vast and wildly complex

no matter how much you seek to experience all that it has to offer, you never will

and I think that’s why we need great storytellers

filmmakers, journalists, poets…they help fill in our blind spots of all the universe we can’t see
